# CopyBrain

Website

https://copybrainapp.xyz

Tagline

Your second brain for everything you copy.

Description

CopyBrain automatically remembers everything you copy and organizes it into a searchable timeline.

Platforms

Windows
macOS
Linux

Core Features

Unlimited Clipboard History

Timeline

Calendar

Search

Collections

Favorites

Offline First

Encrypted Database

Cross Platform

Security & Privacy

100% Offline First — no cloud sync required
End-to-End Encrypted Local Database
Your Clipboard Data Never Leaves Your Device
No Account, No Telemetry, No Tracking
Safe for API Keys, Secrets, and LLM Prompts
